wiki_pages.body: BioTech Corp reported strong Q3 results, citing 12% revenue growth driven by their lead drug pipeline. CEO Jane Smith raised full-year guidance after a successful drug launch. The company holds three FDA-approved compounds and expects two additional approvals in the next 12 months.

FinTech Solutions expanded its payments platform into Southeast Asia, targeting 50M unbanked customers. Revenue reached $120M with 35% YoY growth. The company signed partnerships with three regional banks and expects breakeven by Q2 next year.
